title: tovomitopsis standleyana
intro: Tovomitopsis standleyana is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the yellow wax or yellow wax tree. It is native to Central America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
